item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-048","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response opens immediately with a corrective definition-owner judgment: prompt engineering is not essentially wording technique, and definition belongs to task/result organization rather than expression form.
